APIError.description: APIError is an api error with a message

url.description: URL contains the documentation URL for this error

AccessToken.title: AccessToken represents an API access token.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the token was created

id.description: The unique identifier of the access token

last_used_at.description: The timestamp when the token was last used

name.description: The name of the access token

scopes.description: The scopes granted to this access token

sha1.description: The SHA1 hash of the access token

token_last_eight.description: The last eight characters of the token

display_title.description: DisplayTitle is the display title for the workflow run

event.description: Event is the type of event that triggered the workflow

head_branch.description: HeadBranch is the branch that triggered the workflow

head_sha.description: HeadSHA is the commit SHA that triggered the workflow

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the action task

name.description: Name is the name of the workflow

run_number.description: RunNumber is the sequential number of the workflow run

status.description: Status indicates the current status of the workflow run

url.description: URL is the API URL for this workflow run

workflow_id.description: WorkflowID is the identifier of the workflow

total_count.description: TotalCount is the total number of workflow runs

workflow_runs.description: Entries contains the list of workflow runs

ActionVariable.description: ActionVariable return value of the query API

description.description: the description of the variable

name.description: the name of the variable

owner_id.description: the owner to which the variable belongs

repo_id.description: the repository to which the variable belongs

badge_url.description: BadgeURL is the URL for the workflow badge

html_url.description: HTMLURL is the web URL for viewing the workflow

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the workflow

name.description: Name is the name of the workflow

path.description: Path is the file path of the workflow

state.description: State indicates if the workflow is active or disabled

url.description: URL is the API URL for this workflow

ActionWorkflowStep.description: ActionWorkflowStep represents a step of a WorkflowJob

act_user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action

comment_id.description: The ID of the comment associated with the activity (if applicable)

content.description: Additional content or details about the activity

created.description: The date and time when the activity occurred

id.description: The unique identifier of the activity

is_private.description: Whether this activity is from a private repository

ref_name.description: The name of the git reference (branch/tag) associated with the activity

repo_id.description: The ID of the repository associated with the activity

user_id.description: The ID of the user who receives/sees this activity

@context.description: Context defines the JSON-LD context for ActivityPub

AddCollaboratorOption.description: AddCollaboratorOption options when adding a user as a collaborator of a repository

AddTimeOption.description: AddTimeOption options for adding time to an issue

user_name.description: username of the user who spent the time working on the issue (optional)

message.description: The message associated with the annotated tag

sha.description: The SHA hash of the annotated tag

tag.description: The name of the annotated tag

url.description: The URL to access the annotated tag

AnnotatedTagObject.description: AnnotatedTagObject contains meta information of the tag object

sha.description: The SHA hash of the tagged object

type.description: The type of the tagged object (e.g., commit, tree)

url.description: The URL to access the tagged object

ApplyDiffPatchFileOptions.description:
ApplyDiffPatchFileOptions options for applying a diff patch
Note: `author` and `committer` are optional (if only one is given, it will be used for the other, otherwise the authenticated user will be used)

branch.description: branch (optional) to base this file from. if not given, the default branch is used

message.description: message (optional) for the commit of this file. if not supplied, a default message will be used

new_branch.description: new_branch (optional) will make a new branch from `branch` before creating the file

signoff.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer by the committer at the end of the commit log message.

browser_download_url.description: DownloadURL is the URL to download the attachment

download_count.description: DownloadCount is the number of times the attachment has been downloaded

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the attachment

name.description: Name is the filename of the attachment

size.description: Size is the file size in bytes

uuid.description: UUID is the unique identifier for the attachment file

effective_branch_protection_name.description: EffectiveBranchProtectionName is the name of the effective branch protection rule

enable_status_check.description: EnableStatusCheck indicates if status checks are enabled

name.description: Name is the branch name

protected.description: Protected indicates if the branch is protected

required_approvals.description: RequiredApprovals is the number of required approvals for pull requests

status_check_contexts.description: StatusCheckContexts contains the list of required status check contexts

user_can_merge.description: UserCanMerge indicates if the current user can merge to this branch

user_can_push.description: UserCanPush indicates if the current user can push to this branch

BranchProtection.description: BranchProtection represents a branch protection for a repository

priority.description: Priority is the priority of this branch protection rule

rule_name.description: RuleName is the name of the branch protection rule

ChangeFileOperation.description: ChangeFileOperation for creating, updating or deleting a file

content.description: new or updated file content, it must be base64 encoded

from_path.description: old path of the file to move

operation.description:
indicates what to do with the file: "create" for creating a new file, "update" for updating an existing file,
"upload" for creating or updating a file, "rename" for renaming a file, and "delete" for deleting an existing file.

path.description: path to the existing or new file

sha.description: the blob ID (SHA) for the file that already exists, required for changing existing files

ChangeFilesOptions.description:
ChangeFilesOptions options for creating, updating or deleting multiple files
Note: `author` and `committer` are optional (if only one is given, it will be used for the other, otherwise the authenticated user will be used)

branch.description: branch (optional) to base this file from. if not given, the default branch is used

message.description: message (optional) for the commit of this file. if not supplied, a default message will be used

new_branch.description: new_branch (optional) will make a new branch from `branch` before creating the file

signoff.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer by the committer at the end of the commit log message.

ChangedFile.description: ChangedFile store information about files affected by the pull request

additions.description: The number of lines added to the file

changes.description: The total number of changes to the file

contents_url.description: The API URL to get the file contents

deletions.description: The number of lines deleted from the file

filename.description: The name of the changed file

html_url.description: The HTML URL to view the file changes

previous_filename.description: The previous filename if the file was renamed

raw_url.description: The raw URL to download the file

status.description: The status of the file change (added, modified, deleted, etc.)

CombinedStatus.description: CombinedStatus holds the combined state of several statuses for a single commit

commit_url.description: CommitURL is the API URL for the commit

sha.description: SHA is the commit SHA this status applies to

state.description:
State is the overall combined status state
pending CommitStatusPending  CommitStatusPending is for when the CommitStatus is Pending
success CommitStatusSuccess  CommitStatusSuccess is for when the CommitStatus is Success
error CommitStatusError  CommitStatusError is for when the CommitStatus is Error
failure CommitStatusFailure  CommitStatusFailure is for when the CommitStatus is Failure
warning CommitStatusWarning  CommitStatusWarning is for when the CommitStatus is Warning
skipped CommitStatusSkipped  CommitStatusSkipped is for when CommitStatus is Skipped
state.x-go-enum-desc:
pending CommitStatusPending  CommitStatusPending is for when the CommitStatus is Pending
success CommitStatusSuccess  CommitStatusSuccess is for when the CommitStatus is Success
error CommitStatusError  CommitStatusError is for when the CommitStatus is Error
failure CommitStatusFailure  CommitStatusFailure is for when the CommitStatus is Failure
warning CommitStatusWarning  CommitStatusWarning is for when the CommitStatus is Warning
skipped CommitStatusSkipped  CommitStatusSkipped is for when CommitStatus is Skipped

statuses.description: Statuses contains all individual commit statuses

total_count.description: TotalCount is the total number of statuses

url.description: URL is the API URL for this combined status

Comment.description: Comment represents a comment on a commit or issue

assets.description: Attachments contains files attached to the comment

body.description: Body contains the comment text content

html_url.description: HTMLURL is the web URL for viewing the comment

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the comment

issue_url.description: IssueURL is the API URL for the issue

original_author.description: OriginalAuthor is the original author name (for imported comments)

original_author_id.description: OriginalAuthorID is the original author ID (for imported comments)

pull_request_url.description: PRURL is the API URL for the pull request (if applicable)

Commit.title: Commit contains information generated from a Git commit.

files.description: Files contains information about files affected by the commit

html_url.description: HTMLURL is the web URL for viewing the commit

parents.description: Parents contains the parent commit information

sha.description: SHA is the commit SHA hash

url.description: URL is the API URL for the commit

CommitAffectedFiles.description: CommitAffectedFiles store information about files affected by the commit

filename.description: Filename is the path of the affected file

status.description: Status indicates how the file was affected (added, modified, deleted)

CommitDateOptions.description: CommitDateOptions store dates for GIT_AUTHOR_DATE and GIT_COMMITTER_DATE

CommitMeta.title: CommitMeta contains meta information of a commit in terms of API.

sha.description: SHA is the commit SHA hash

url.description: URL is the API URL for the commit

CommitStats.description: CommitStats is statistics for a RepoCommit

additions.description: Additions is the number of lines added

deletions.description: Deletions is the number of lines deleted

total.description: Total is the total number of lines changed

CommitStatus.description: CommitStatus holds a single status of a single Commit

context.description: Context is the unique context identifier for the status

description.description: Description provides a brief description of the status

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the commit status

status.description:
State represents the status state (pending, success, error, failure)
pending CommitStatusPending  CommitStatusPending is for when the CommitStatus is Pending
success CommitStatusSuccess  CommitStatusSuccess is for when the CommitStatus is Success
error CommitStatusError  CommitStatusError is for when the CommitStatus is Error
failure CommitStatusFailure  CommitStatusFailure is for when the CommitStatus is Failure
warning CommitStatusWarning  CommitStatusWarning is for when the CommitStatus is Warning
skipped CommitStatusSkipped  CommitStatusSkipped is for when CommitStatus is Skipped
status.x-go-enum-desc:
pending CommitStatusPending  CommitStatusPending is for when the CommitStatus is Pending
success CommitStatusSuccess  CommitStatusSuccess is for when the CommitStatus is Success
error CommitStatusError  CommitStatusError is for when the CommitStatus is Error
failure CommitStatusFailure  CommitStatusFailure is for when the CommitStatus is Failure
warning CommitStatusWarning  CommitStatusWarning is for when the CommitStatus is Warning
skipped CommitStatusSkipped  CommitStatusSkipped is for when CommitStatus is Skipped

target_url.description: TargetURL is the URL to link to for more details

url.description: URL is the API URL for this status

CommitUser.title: CommitUser contains information of a user in the context of a commit.

date.description: Date is the commit date in string format

name.description: Name is the person's name

Compare.title: Compare represents a comparison between two commits.

dir_contents.description: DirContents contains directory listing when the path represents a directory

ContentsResponse.description: ContentsResponse contains information about a repo's entry's (dir, file, symlink, submodule) metadata and content

content.description: `content` is populated when `type` is `file`, otherwise null

download_url.description: DownloadURL is the direct download URL for this file

encoding.description: `encoding` is populated when `type` is `file`, otherwise null

git_url.description: GitURL is the Git API URL for this blob or tree

html_url.description: HTMLURL is the web URL for this file or directory

last_commit_message.description: LastCommitMessage is the message of the last commit that affected this file

last_commit_sha.description: LastCommitSHA is the SHA of the last commit that affected this file

lfs_oid.description: LfsOid is the Git LFS object ID if this file is stored in LFS

lfs_size.description: LfsSize is the file size if this file is stored in LFS

name.description: Name is the file or directory name

path.description: Path is the full path to the file or directory

sha.description: SHA is the Git blob or tree SHA

size.description: Size is the file size in bytes

submodule_git_url.description: `submodule_git_url` is populated when `type` is `submodule`, otherwise null

target.description: `target` is populated when `type` is `symlink`, otherwise null

url.description: URL is the API URL for this file or directory

CreateAccessTokenOption.description: CreateAccessTokenOption options when create access token

CreateActionWorkflowDispatch.description: CreateActionWorkflowDispatch represents the payload for triggering a workflow dispatch event

CreateBranchProtectionOption.description: CreateBranchProtectionOption options for creating a branch protection

CreateBranchRepoOption.description: CreateBranchRepoOption options when creating a branch in a repository

new_branch_name.description: Name of the branch to create

old_branch_name.description:
Deprecated: true
Name of the old branch to create from

old_ref_name.description: Name of the old branch/tag/commit to create from

CreateEmailOption.description: CreateEmailOption options when creating email addresses

CreateFileOptions.description:
CreateFileOptions options for creating files
Note: `author` and `committer` are optional (if only one is given, it will be used for the other, otherwise the authenticated user will be used)

branch.description: branch (optional) to base this file from. if not given, the default branch is used

message.description: message (optional) for the commit of this file. if not supplied, a default message will be used

new_branch.description: new_branch (optional) will make a new branch from `branch` before creating the file

signoff.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer by the committer at the end of the commit log message.

CreateForkOption.description: CreateForkOption options for creating a fork

name.description: name of the forked repository

organization.description: organization name, if forking into an organization

CreateGPGKeyOption.description: CreateGPGKeyOption options create user GPG key

armored_public_key.description: An armored GPG key to add

armored_signature.description: An optional armored signature for the GPG key

CreateHookOption.description: CreateHookOption options when create a hook

authorization_header.description: Authorization header to include in webhook requests

branch_filter.description: Branch filter pattern to determine which branches trigger the webhook

events.description: List of events that will trigger this webhook

CreateHookOptionConfig.description:
CreateHookOptionConfig has all config options in it
required are "content_type" and "url" Required

CreateIssueCommentOption.description: CreateIssueCommentOption options for creating a comment on an issue

CreateIssueOption.description: CreateIssueOption options to create one issue

CreateKeyOption.description: CreateKeyOption options when creating a key

key.description: An armored SSH key to add

read_only.description: Describe if the key has only read access or read/write

title.description: Title of the key to add

CreateLabelOption.description: CreateLabelOption options for creating a label

description.description: Description provides additional context about the label's purpose

CreateMilestoneOption.description: CreateMilestoneOption options for creating a milestone

description.description: Description provides details about the milestone

title.description: Title is the title of the new milestone

CreateOAuth2ApplicationOptions.description: CreateOAuth2ApplicationOptions holds options to create an oauth2 application

name.description: The name of the OAuth2 application

redirect_uris.description: The list of allowed redirect URIs

CreateOrUpdateSecretOption.description: CreateOrUpdateSecretOption options when creating or updating secret

data.description: Data of the secret to update

description.description: Description of the secret to update

CreateOrgOption.description: CreateOrgOption options for creating an organization

description.description: The description of the organization

email.description: The email address of the organization

full_name.description: The full display name of the organization

repo_admin_change_team_access.description: Whether repository administrators can change team access

website.description: The website URL of the organization

CreatePullRequestOption.description: CreatePullRequestOption options when creating a pull request

base.description: The base branch for the pull request

body.description: The description body of the pull request

head.description:
The head branch for the pull request, it could be a branch name on the base repository or
a form like `<username>:<branch>` which refers to the user's fork repository's branch.

labels.description: The list of label IDs to assign to the pull request

milestone.description: The milestone ID to assign to the pull request

team_reviewers.description: The list of team reviewer names

title.description: The title of the pull request

CreatePullReviewComment.description: CreatePullReviewComment represent a review comment for creation api

new_position.description: if comment to new file line or 0

old_position.description: if comment to old file line or 0

CreatePullReviewOptions.description: CreatePullReviewOptions are options to create a pull review

CreatePushMirrorOption.title: CreatePushMirrorOption represents need information to create a push mirror of a repository.

interval.description: The sync interval for automatic updates

remote_address.description: The remote repository URL to push to

remote_password.description: The password for authentication with the remote repository

remote_username.description: The username for authentication with the remote repository

sync_on_commit.description: Whether to sync on every commit

CreateReleaseOption.description: CreateReleaseOption options when creating a release

draft.description: Whether to create the release as a draft

name.description: The display title of the release

prerelease.description: Whether to mark the release as a prerelease

tag_message.description: The message for the git tag

target_commitish.description: The target commitish for the release

auto_init.description: Whether the repository should be auto-initialized?

default_branch.description: DefaultBranch of the repository (used when initializes and in template)

description.description: Description of the repository to create

name.description: Name of the repository to create

object_format_name.description: ObjectFormatName of the underlying git repository, empty string for default (sha1)

readme.description: Readme of the repository to create

CreateStatusOption.description: CreateStatusOption holds the information needed to create a new CommitStatus for a Commit

context.description: Context is the unique context identifier for the status

description.description: Description provides a brief description of the status

state.description:
State represents the status state to set (pending, success, error, failure)
pending CommitStatusPending  CommitStatusPending is for when the CommitStatus is Pending
success CommitStatusSuccess  CommitStatusSuccess is for when the CommitStatus is Success
error CommitStatusError  CommitStatusError is for when the CommitStatus is Error
failure CommitStatusFailure  CommitStatusFailure is for when the CommitStatus is Failure
warning CommitStatusWarning  CommitStatusWarning is for when the CommitStatus is Warning
skipped CommitStatusSkipped  CommitStatusSkipped is for when CommitStatus is Skipped
state.x-go-enum-desc:
pending CommitStatusPending  CommitStatusPending is for when the CommitStatus is Pending
success CommitStatusSuccess  CommitStatusSuccess is for when the CommitStatus is Success
error CommitStatusError  CommitStatusError is for when the CommitStatus is Error
failure CommitStatusFailure  CommitStatusFailure is for when the CommitStatus is Failure
warning CommitStatusWarning  CommitStatusWarning is for when the CommitStatus is Warning
skipped CommitStatusSkipped  CommitStatusSkipped is for when CommitStatus is Skipped

target_url.description: TargetURL is the URL to link to for more details

For explicitly setting the user creation timestamp. Useful when users are
migrated from other systems. When omitted, the user's creation timestamp
will be set to "now".

visibility.description: User visibility level: public, limited, or private

DeleteFileOptions options for deleting files (used for other File structs below)
Note: `author` and `committer` are optional (if only one is given, it will be used for the other, otherwise the authenticated user will be used)

branch.description: branch (optional) to base this file from. if not given, the default branch is used

new_branch.description: new_branch (optional) will make a new branch from `branch` before creating the file

signoff.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer by the committer at the end of the commit log message.

tag_name.description: The new name of the git tag

target_commitish.description: The new target commitish for the release

EditRepoOption.description: EditRepoOption options when editing a repository's properties

allow_fast_forward_only_merge.description: either `true` to allow fast-forward-only merging pull requests, or `false` to prevent fast-forward-only merging.

allow_manual_merge.description: either `true` to allow mark pr as merged manually, or `false` to prevent it.

allow_merge_commits.description: either `true` to allow merging pull requests with a merge commit, or `false` to prevent merging pull requests with merge commits.

allow_rebase.description: either `true` to allow rebase-merging pull requests, or `false` to prevent rebase-merging.

allow_rebase_explicit.description: either `true` to allow rebase with explicit merge commits (--no-ff), or `false` to prevent rebase with explicit merge commits.

allow_rebase_update.description: either `true` to allow updating pull request branch by rebase, or `false` to prevent it.

allow_squash_merge.description: either `true` to allow squash-merging pull requests, or `false` to prevent squash-merging.

archived.description: set to `true` to archive this repository.

autodetect_manual_merge.description: either `true` to enable AutodetectManualMerge, or `false` to prevent it. Note: In some special cases, misjudgments can occur.

default_allow_maintainer_edit.description: set to `true` to allow edits from maintainers by default

default_branch.description: sets the default branch for this repository.

default_delete_branch_after_merge.description: set to `true` to delete pr branch after merge by default

default_merge_style.description: set to a merge style to be used by this repository: "merge", "rebase", "rebase-merge", "squash", or "fast-forward-only".

description.description: a short description of the repository.

enable_prune.description: enable prune - remove obsolete remote-tracking references when mirroring

has_actions.description: either `true` to enable actions unit, or `false` to disable them.

has_code.description: either `true` to enable code for this repository or `false` to disable it.

has_issues.description: either `true` to enable issues for this repository or `false` to disable them.

has_packages.description: either `true` to enable packages unit, or `false` to disable them.

has_projects.description: either `true` to enable project unit, or `false` to disable them.

has_pull_requests.description: either `true` to allow pull requests, or `false` to prevent pull request.

has_releases.description: either `true` to enable releases unit, or `false` to disable them.

has_wiki.description: either `true` to enable the wiki for this repository or `false` to disable it.

ignore_whitespace_conflicts.description: either `true` to ignore whitespace for conflicts, or `false` to not ignore whitespace.

mirror_interval.description: set to a string like `8h30m0s` to set the mirror interval time

name.description: name of the repository

private.description:
either `true` to make the repository private or `false` to make it public.
Note: you will get a 422 error if the organization restricts changing repository visibility to organization
owners and a non-owner tries to change the value of private.

projects_mode.description: `repo` to only allow repo-level projects, `owner` to only allow owner projects, `all` to allow both.

template.description: either `true` to make this repository a template or `false` to make it a normal repository

website.description: a URL with more information about the repository.

RepoTransfer.description: RepoTransfer represents a pending repo transfer

object_format_name.description: ObjectFormatName of the underlying git repository

SearchResults.description: SearchResults results of a successful search

data.description: Data contains the repository search results

ok.description: OK indicates if the search was successful

description.description: the secret's description

name.description: the secret's name

ServerVersion.description: ServerVersion wraps the version of the server

version.description: Version is the server version string

duration.description: Duration is a human-readable duration string

issue_index.description: IssueIndex is the index number of the associated issue

issue_title.description: IssueTitle is the title of the associated issue

repo_name.description: RepoName is the name of the repository

repo_owner_name.description: RepoOwnerName is the name of the repository owner

seconds.description: Seconds is the total elapsed time in seconds

SubmitPullReviewOptions.description: SubmitPullReviewOptions are options to submit a pending pull review

id.description: The ID (SHA) of the tag

message.description: The message associated with the tag

name.description: The name of the tag

tarball_url.description: The URL to download the tarball archive

zipball_url.description: The URL to download the zipball archive

id.description: The unique identifier of the tag protection

name_pattern.description: The pattern to match tag names for protection

whitelist_teams.description: List of team names allowed to create/delete protected tags

whitelist_usernames.description: List of usernames allowed to create/delete protected tags

Team.description: Team represents a team in an organization

can_create_org_repo.description: Whether the team can create repositories in the organization

description.description: The description of the team

id.description: The unique identifier of the team

includes_all_repositories.description: Whether the team has access to all repositories in the organization

name.description: The name of the team

TimelineComment.description: TimelineComment represents a timeline comment (comment of any type) on a commit or issue

body.description: Body contains the timeline event content

html_url.description: HTMLURL is the web URL for viewing the comment

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the timeline comment

issue_url.description: IssueURL is the API URL for the issue

pull_request_url.description: PRURL is the API URL for the pull request (if applicable)

ref_commit_sha.description: commit SHA where issue/PR was referenced

removed_assignee.description: whether the assignees were removed or added

type.description: Type indicates the type of timeline event

TopicName.description: TopicName a list of repo topic names

created.description: The date and time when the topic was created

id.description: The unique identifier of the topic

repo_count.description: The number of repositories using this topic

updated.description: The date and time when the topic was last updated

TrackedTime.description: TrackedTime worked time for an issue / pr

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the tracked time entry

TransferRepoOption.description: TransferRepoOption options when transfer a repository's ownership

team_ids.description: ID of the team or teams to add to the repository. Teams can only be added to organization-owned repositories.

UpdateBranchProtectionPriories.description: UpdateBranchProtectionPriories a list to update the branch protection rule priorities

UpdateFileOptions.description:
UpdateFileOptions options for updating files
Note: `author` and `committer` are optional (if only one is given, it will be used for the other, otherwise the authenticated user will be used)

branch.description: branch (optional) to base this file from. if not given, the default branch is used

from_path.description: from_path (optional) is the path of the original file which will be moved/renamed to the path in the URL

message.description: message (optional) for the commit of this file. if not supplied, a default message will be used

new_branch.description: new_branch (optional) will make a new branch from `branch` before creating the file

sha.description: the blob ID (SHA) for the file that already exists, it is required for changing existing files

signoff.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer by the committer at the end of the commit log message.

UpdateRepoAvatarOption.description: UpdateRepoAvatarUserOption options when updating the repo avatar

UpdateUserAvatarOption.description: UpdateUserAvatarUserOption options when updating the user avatar

UpdateVariableOption.description: UpdateVariableOption the option when updating variable

description.description: Description of the variable to update

name.description: New name for the variable. If the field is empty, the variable name won't be updated.

value.description: Value of the variable to update

description.description: the user's description

html_url.description: URL to the user's gitea page

id.description: the user's id

login.description: login of the user, same as `username`

login_name.description: identifier of the user, provided by the external authenticator (if configured)

source_id.description: The ID of the user's Authentication Source

visibility.description: User visibility level option: public, limited, private

UserBadgeOption.description: UserBadgeOption options for link between users and badges

UserHeatmapData.description: UserHeatmapData represents the data needed to create a heatmap

UserSettingsOptions.description: UserSettingsOptions represents options to change user settings

WatchInfo.description: WatchInfo represents an API watch status of one repository

created_at.description: The timestamp when the watch status was created

ignored.description: Whether notifications for the repository are ignored

reason.description: The reason for the current watch status

repository_url.description: The URL of the repository being watched

subscribed.description: Whether the repository is being watched for notifications

url.description: The URL for managing the watch status

commit_count.description: The number of commits that modified this page

footer.description: The footer content for the wiki page

html_url.description: The HTML URL to view the wiki page

sidebar.description: The sidebar content for the wiki page

sub_url.description: The sub URL path for the wiki page

title.description: The title of the wiki page

html_url.description: The HTML URL to view the wiki page

sub_url.description: The sub URL path for the wiki page

title.description: The title of the wiki page

AccessToken.description: AccessToken represents an API access token.

AccessTokenList.description: AccessTokenList represents a list of API access token.

X-HasMore.description: True if there is another page
True if there is another page

MarkdownRender.description: MarkdownRender is a rendered markdown document

MarkupRender.description: MarkupRender is a rendered markup document

OAuth2ApplicationList.description: OAuth2ApplicationList represents a list of OAuth2 applications.

RegistrationToken.description: RegistrationToken is response related to registration token

conflict.description: APIConflict is a conflict empty response

forbidden.description: APIForbiddenError is a forbidden error response

invalidTopicsError.description: APIInvalidTopicsError is error format response to invalid topics

notFound.description: APINotFound is a not found empty response

repoArchivedError.description: APIRepoArchivedError is an error that is raised when an archived repo should be modified

validationError.description: APIValidationError is error format response related to input validation

AccessToken.description: This authentication option is deprecated for removal in Gitea 1.23. Please use AuthorizationHeaderToken instead.
AccessToken.name: access_token

AuthorizationHeaderToken.description: API tokens must be prepended with "token" followed by a space.
AuthorizationHeaderToken.name: Authorization

SudoHeader.description: Sudo API request as the user provided as the key. Admin privileges are required.
SudoHeader.name: Sudo

SudoParam.description: Sudo API request as the user provided as the key. Admin privileges are required.
SudoParam.name: sudo

TOTPHeader.description: Must be used in combination with BasicAuth if two-factor authentication is enabled.
TOTPHeader.name: X-GITEA-OTP

Token.description: This authentication option is deprecated for removal in Gitea 1.23. Please use AuthorizationHeaderToken instead.
Token.name: token
